name_en: Burberry New Exquisite Crossbody Bag, Original Quality! Made of selected cotton canvas with exquisite leather details. Features the brand's Horseferry print and exquisite three rivets. Can be worn crossbody or worn as a handbag by removing the strap. 18 x 8 x 12cm
